items.title_zh: 年度商业晚会及颁奖典礼
items.desc_en: Join us for our flagship annual dinner celebrating CCCWA members and recognizing outstanding contributions to the Washington business community.
items.desc_zh: 诚邀您出席年度旗舰晚会，共同表彰CCCWA会员中的杰出贡献。

items.desc_en: A full-day forum featuring keynote speakers, panel discussions, and networking opportunities.
items.desc_zh: 全天论坛，包括主题演讲、圆桌讨论和交流合作机会。

items.desc_en: A casual networking event for CCCWA members and prospective members. RSVP required.
items.desc_zh: 为CCCWA会员及潜在会员举办的轻松交流活动，需提前报名。
